title: NoC static knowledge graph for the next 10 notarial case types
purpose: Extend the NoC notarial case catalog with ten additional frequent workflows while keeping real mandate values outside Git.
privacy_rule: All value fields are intentionally empty. Real client, property, company, family, estate or health data belongs in approved local evidence stores, not in this repository.

source_refs.label: Beurkundungsgesetz for notarial recording, certifications and review duties
GBO Sections 19, 29 and 46 for land-register authorization, evidence form and deletion notation
BGB Section 875 for cancellation of rights in land
WEG Section 8 for division by the owner into apartment or partial ownership
BGB Section 311b for contracts concerning real estate
AbschlagsV for installment-payment arrangements in developer contracts
GmbHG Section 53 for form of articles amendments
GmbHG Section 15 for transfer of GmbH shares
HGB Section 12 for electronic commercial-register applications in publicly certified form
BGB Section 1945 for form of inheritance renunciation
BGB Sections 2346 and 2348 for inheritance and compulsory-share waivers
BGB Section 1750 for adoption consent declarations
BGB Sections 167 and 129 for powers of attorney and public certification

cases.title: Loeschungsbewilligung / Grundbuchloeschung
cases.summary: Deletion of registered land rights, often old land charges after loan repayment, with creditor authorization, owner consent, deed/evidence form and filing trace.

required_information.label: Property and register identity
required_information.question: Which land register district, sheet, section and entry are affected?

required_information.label: Right to be deleted
required_information.question: Which land charge, mortgage, easement, restriction or other right should be deleted?

required_information.label: Creditor or beneficiary authorization
required_information.question: Who is the current beneficiary and how is authorization to consent to deletion proven?

required_information.label: Owner consent and representation
required_information.question: Is owner consent required and who may sign for the owner?

required_information.label: Brief or book right status
required_information.question: Is the right certificated by a letter, and if so where is the letter or replacement evidence?

required_information.label: Filing route and post-deletion notification
required_information.question: Which notary filing route, portal and completion notification should be used?

documents.label: Land-charge, mortgage or replacement letter evidence if required

decisions.label: Full deletion, partial deletion or correction

cases.title: Teilungserklaerung nach WEG
cases.summary: Division of a building into apartment or partial ownership with declaration of division, community rules, plans, certificates and land-register implementation.

required_information.label: Base property identity
required_information.question: Which land register sheet and cadastral object will be divided?

required_information.label: Owner and authority
required_information.question: Who owns the property and is the owner authorized to divide?

required_information.label: Unit structure and allocation
required_information.question: Which apartment, partial ownership, rooms and special-use rights are planned?

required_information.label: Co-ownership shares
required_information.question: Which co-ownership fractions are assigned to each unit?

required_information.label: Plans and separation certificate
required_information.question: Are plans, numbering, completion state and authority certificate available?

required_information.label: Existing encumbrance allocation
required_information.question: How do existing rights, land charges, easements or restrictions affect the future unit registers?

documents.label: Declaration of division and community rules

decisions.label: Residential ownership, partial ownership or mixed scheme

cases.title: Bautraegervertrag
cases.summary: Purchase of a property or unit from a developer with construction obligations, installment plan, completion state, securities and consumer-protection gates.

required_information.label: Developer identity and authority
required_information.question: Who is developer and how are register, authority and representation proven?

required_information.label: Buyer identity and consumer status
required_information.question: Who buys and is consumer-protection handling required?

required_information.label: Object, unit and land-register state
required_information.question: Which unit, property, construction phase and land-register state are involved?

required_information.label: Construction specification and completion state
required_information.question: Which building description, plans, permits and completion state define performance?

required_information.label: Installment and maturity plan
required_information.question: Which installment schedule, security model and maturity prerequisites apply?

required_information.label: Acceptance, defects and handover model
required_information.question: How are acceptance, defects, common property and handover handled?

documents.label: Building specification, plans and permits reference

evidence.label: Consumer draft period and review evidence
Construction, permit and maturity evidence trace

cases.title: Gesellschafterbeschluss bei GmbH/UG
cases.summary: Shareholder resolutions for articles amendment, capital measures, managing-director appointment, consent to share transfers or other company decisions.

required_information.label: Company and register identity
required_information.question: Which GmbH/UG, register court and register number are affected?

required_information.label: Resolution type and legal basis
required_information.question: Is this an articles amendment, capital measure, appointment, consent or other resolution?

required_information.label: Shareholders, votes and representation
required_information.question: Who participates, which votes exist and which representatives act?

required_information.label: Majority and consent requirements
required_information.question: Which statutory and articles-based majority or unanimity requirements apply?

required_information.label: Current and amended articles wording
required_information.question: Which current article text is changed and what new wording is proposed?

required_information.label: Register filing and notarized certificate route
required_information.question: Which register application, notary certificate and XNP route are required?

cases.title: Geschaeftsanteilsuebertragung GmbH
cases.summary: Sale, gift or other transfer of GmbH shares with parties, share chain, consent restrictions, purchase price, shareholder list and register filing evidence.

required_information.label: Company and register identity
required_information.question: Which GmbH and register data define the target company?

required_information.label: Shares and chain of title
required_information.question: Which business shares, nominal amounts and chain of title are transferred?

required_information.label: Transferor identity and authority
required_information.question: Who transfers and how is authority verified?

required_information.label: Acquirer identity and beneficial-owner flags
required_information.question: Who acquires and which beneficial-owner or AML flags must be reviewed?

required_information.label: Consent restrictions and pre-emption rights
required_information.question: Do articles, side agreements or shareholder resolutions require consent?

required_information.label: Purchase price, gift and tax flags
required_information.question: Is this a sale, gift, mixed transfer or other transaction with tax flags?

cases.title: Vereinsregisteranmeldung
cases.summary: Association-register filings for board changes, articles amendments, formation or dissolution with public certification, resolutions and attachments.

required_information.label: Association and register identity
required_information.question: Which e.V., register court and register number are affected?

required_information.label: Filing type
required_information.question: Is this board change, articles amendment, formation, dissolution or another filing?

required_information.label: Board signers and authority
required_information.question: Which board members must sign and what representation rule applies?

required_information.label: Meeting and resolution evidence
required_information.question: Which minutes, election records or articles amendment resolutions are needed?

required_information.label: Current articles and changed wording
required_information.question: What is the current articles text and which changes are registered?

required_information.label: Court filing route and copies
required_information.question: Which paper or electronic route and copy package does the register court require?

cases.title: Erbausschlagung
cases.summary: Inheritance renunciation declaration to the estate court with deadline, identity, representation, minors or guardianship flags and delivery evidence.

required_information.label: Decedent and estate court
required_information.question: Who died and which estate court receives the declaration?

required_information.label: Renouncer identity and capacity
required_information.question: Who renounces and how are identity and capacity verified?

required_information.label: Deadline and knowledge date
required_information.question: When did the renouncer learn of the inheritance and is the deadline still open?

required_information.label: Inheritance basis and relationship
required_information.question: Why is the renouncer called as heir or substitute heir?

required_information.label: Minor, guardian or representative flags
required_information.question: Are minors, guardians, parental representation or approvals involved?

required_information.label: Estate-court delivery route
required_information.question: How and when will the declaration reach the competent court?

documents.label: Family or guardianship approval evidence if required

cases.title: Pflichtteilsverzicht / Erbverzicht
cases.summary: Contractual inheritance or compulsory-share waiver, often family succession planning, with parties, scope, compensation, extension to descendants and fairness review.

required_information.label: Future decedent identity and capacity
required_information.question: Who contracts with the waiving party and how is capacity reviewed?

required_information.label: Waiving party identity
required_information.question: Who waives and are representation or approval issues present?

required_information.label: Waiver scope
required_information.question: Is the waiver full inheritance waiver, compulsory-share waiver or limited arrangement?

required_information.label: Effect on descendants
required_information.question: Should or does the waiver extend to descendants?

required_information.label: Compensation or settlement
required_information.question: Is compensation, settlement, transfer or no consideration intended?

required_information.label: Family and fairness flags
required_information.question: Are pressure, dependency, minors, care or imbalance flags present?

cases.title: Adoption / familienrechtliche Erklaerungen
cases.summary: Notarial adoption consent and family-law declarations with identity, consent parties, court destination, capacity, irrevocability and sensitive-data handling.

required_information.label: Declaration type
required_information.question: Which adoption or family-law declaration is needed?

required_information.label: Child or adoptee context
required_information.question: Which child/adoptee context is relevant without storing raw data in Git?

required_information.label: Consenting party identity and capacity
required_information.question: Who gives consent and are capacity, age or support flags present?

required_information.label: Family court destination
required_information.question: Which court receives the declaration and which reference is used?

required_information.label: Irrevocability and condition prohibition flags
required_information.question: Which warnings about irrevocability, conditions or timing must be documented?

required_information.label: Additional consents or approvals
required_information.question: Are parental, guardian, spouse, agency or court approvals relevant?

cases.title: Vollmacht fuer Immobilien- oder Gesellschaftsgeschaefte
cases.summary: Notarized or publicly certified powers of attorney for real-estate contracts, register filings, shareholder meetings or share transfers with scope, form and evidence gates.

required_information.label: Principal identity and capacity
required_information.question: Who grants the power and how are identity and capacity verified?

required_information.label: Agent identity and relation
required_information.question: Who is authorized and what relationship or conflict flags exist?

required_information.label: Transaction scope
required_information.question: Which real-estate, register, shareholder or share-transfer acts are covered?

required_information.label: Required form
required_information.question: Is public certification enough or is notarial recording required for the intended transaction?

required_information.label: Limitations, substitution and expiry
required_information.question: Which restrictions, self-dealing release, sub-authorization, duration or revocation rules apply?

required_information.label: Original, copies and recipient route
required_information.question: Who receives originals or certified copies and how is use evidenced?

documents.label: Power of attorney deed or certification
